parents.subject: LU-13814 clio: remove type from cl_page_find

commit.subject: LU-13814 osc: fix packing of OSC/OTP pages
commit.message:
LU-13814 osc: fix packing of OSC/OTP pages

This patch fixes up the packing of the OSC and OTP pages,
which is easiest to do here at the end rather than worrying
about it at each step of the transformation.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I457d1946331d04f70345241f14f31e05bec820fc
